region.title: region
region.description: Regional endpoint selection Templated in https://{region}.cloudinary.com. Options: [api, api-eu, api-ap].

api_host.title: host
api_host.description: API host domain. Templated in https://{host}.

api_key.title: api_key
api_key.description: The api_key to use for the request

api_secret.title: api_secret
api_secret.description: The api_secret to use for the request

oauth2.title: oauth2
oauth2.description: The oauth2 to use for the request

cloud_name.title: cloud_name
cloud_name.description: The cloud name of your product environment.

tools.name: list-transformations
tools.description:
Lists all transformation definitions in your account, including named transformations

Retrieves a list of all transformations, which can be filtered to show either only named or unnamed transformations.

tools.name: get-transformation-details
tools.description:
Retrieves details of a specific transformation

Retrieves details for a named or unnamed transformation.

tools.name: create-transformation
tools.description:
Creates a new named transformation by assigning a custom name to a set of transformation parameters

Creates a new named transformation with the given name and transformation string.

tools.name: update-transformation
tools.description:
Updates the definition of an existing transformation

Updates a named or unnamed transformation.

tools.name: delete-transformation
tools.description:
Deletes a named transformation from your account

Delete a named or unnamed transformation. Optionally invalidate derived resources generated using the named transformation.

tools.name: create-upload-preset
tools.description: Creates a new upload preset with specified configuration settings

tools.name: list-upload-presets
tools.description: Lists all upload presets configured in the account

tools.name: get-upload-preset-details
tools.description: Retrieves details of a single upload preset

tools.name: update-upload-preset
tools.description: Updates an existing upload preset's configuration settings

tools.name: delete-upload-preset
tools.description: Deletes an upload preset from the account

tools.name: list-upload-mappings
tools.description:
Retrieves a list of all upload mapping rules configured in your Cloudinary product environment

Returns a list of all upload mappings defined for your account.
Upload mappings allow you to map an upload preset to a specific folder and URL template.

tools.name: create-upload-mapping
tools.description:
Creates a new upload mapping

Creates a new upload mapping for the specified folder

tools.name: update-upload-mapping
tools.description:
Updates an existing upload mapping by changing its remote URL template for a given folder

Updates the URL template for an existing folder mapping

tools.name: delete-upload-mapping
tools.description:
Deletes a folder upload mapping

Permanently deletes the upload mapping for the specified folder

tools.name: list-triggers
tools.description:
Lists all webhook notification triggers configured for your product environment

Retrieves a list of all event triggers and notifications within your product environment.

tools.name: create-trigger
tools.description:
Creates a new notification trigger (webhook) by specifying an event type and a destination

Creates a new trigger.
Your product environment supports triggers up to a maximum determined by multiplying the number of unique event types by the limit of 30 notification URLs.

tools.name: update-trigger
tools.description:
Updates the callback URL of an existing webhook trigger in your Cloudinary account

Updates a notification URL for a trigger.

tools.name: delete-trigger
tools.description:
Deletes a notification trigger

Deletes a trigger.

tools.name: test-trigger
tools.description:
Tests an existing trigger's filter against sample data

Evaluates an existing trigger's filter against provided sample data.
Use this endpoint to verify that a trigger's filter will match expected events.

tools.name: create-streaming-profile
tools.description: Creates a new adaptive streaming profile in your Cloudinary account

tools.name: list-streaming-profiles
tools.description: Lists all adaptive streaming profiles (both built-in and custom) defined in your Cloudinary account

tools.name: get-streaming-profile
tools.description: Retrieves the details of a single adaptive streaming profile by its name

tools.name: update-streaming-profile
tools.description: Modifies an existing adaptive streaming profile's configuration

tools.name: delete-streaming-profile
tools.description: Delete custom streaming profile or revert built-in profile to the original settings
